audience: Customer support agents handling post-purchase issues
expected_behavior: Produce a precise support reply that follows policy exactly, avoids operational overpromises, and clearly separates the decision, rationale, and next action.
purpose: Write production-quality support responses for refund, shipping, and warranty requests where policy accuracy and next-step clarity matter.
release_notes: Adds stricter language around approval gates, warranty qualification, and unsupported requests.
success_criteria: Replies are concise, operationally safe, explicitly grounded in the provided policy text, and structured so an agent could send them with minimal editing.
